metadata.description: DOCX automation libraries plus accessibility and document quality guidance.

python_libraries.name: python-docx Documentation
python_libraries.relevance: Primary reference for creating and editing .docx files in Python.

python_libraries.name: docxtpl Documentation
python_libraries.relevance: Template-based DOCX generation (mail merge-style) in Python.

nodejs_libraries.name: docx (docx.js)
nodejs_libraries.relevance: Generate .docx documents in Node.js with structured APIs.

nodejs_libraries.name: mammoth.js
nodejs_libraries.relevance: Convert .docx to HTML and extract content reliably for downstream processing.

quality_and_accessibility.name: Make your Word documents accessible (Microsoft Support)
quality_and_accessibility.relevance: Baseline accessibility practices for Word documents (styles, headings, tables, alt text).

quality_and_accessibility.name: Office Open XML (ECMA-376)
quality_and_accessibility.relevance: Underlying standard behind .docx; helpful for interoperability edge cases.

quality_and_accessibility.name: Open XML SDK (Microsoft)
quality_and_accessibility.relevance: Low-level .docx (OOXML) manipulation patterns, useful when high-level libs cannot express required changes.

quality_and_accessibility.name: docx4j (docx4java)
quality_and_accessibility.relevance: Java library for advanced .docx (OOXML) operations, including revision- and interoperability-heavy workflows.
